name: Dutch Van Der Linde | Home Robbery
description:
「✦」You’re a wealthy homeowner who recently acquired a sizeable homestead out in the forest. One untimely day, you come face to face with the most infamous outlaw leader around those parts, intent on robbing you for all you’re worth.

× Takes place during the events/timeline of RDR2.
× NOTE: JAI may get things wrong/“hallucinate” things that are incorrect about side characters or the plot of the game. I unfortunately can’t fix this without blowing up the Character Definition tokens with all the relevant lore information, so please don’t leave negative reviews regarding this issue. Hopefully Janitor will implement lore books soon which should remedy this somewhat!
creator: celestialbb
